title: Ikizamini "Leben in Deutschland": Ibibazo 310 byahinduwe mu Kinyarwanda
description: Ikizamini cy'ubwenegihugu bw'Ubudage "Leben in Deutschland": ibibazo 310 mu ndimi 100+. Witegure mu Kinyarwanda — ku buntu kandi nta interineti.
icon_alt: Ikimenyetso cya porogaramu ya LiD Trainer
h1: Ikizamini cy'ubwenegihugu — mu rurimi rwawe kavukire
hero_sub: Ibibazo byose 310 by'umwimerere by'ikizamini "Leben in Deutschland", byahinduwe mu Kinyarwanda. Wige byoroshye, ku muvuduko wawe, nta interineti ikenewe.
hero_note: Ku buntu · Ikora nta interineti · Ibibazo bya leta zose 16
hero_img_alt: Urupapuro rw'itangiriro rwa porogaramu mu Kinyarwanda: ibibazo byose, ibibazo by'akarere, ibyo ukunda, imibare
lang_p1: Buri kibazo cyerekanwa mu Kidage — nk'uko bimeze ku kizamini nyacyo — hamwe n'ubusobanuro mu Kinyarwanda hepfo yacyo. Wiga ibyo ugomba kumenya n'amagambo nyayo uzabona ku kizamini.
lang_p2: Porogaramu itanga ubusobanuro mu ndimi zirenga 100 — icy'ingenzi ni uko urwawe rumaze kuhaba.
demo_t: Mu Budage, abantu bemerewe kunenga leta mu ruhame kubera ko …
demo_caption: Ikibazo cya 1 muri 310 · hisha ubusobanuro ukandagije rimwe gusa
feat_h2: Ibyo ukeneye byose kugira ngo witegure — muri porogaramu imwe
feat_lede: Amakarita nk'aya muri porogaramu: yoroshye, asobanutse, nta kindi cyongerwaho.
feat1_p: Ibibazo rusange 300 hamwe n'ibibazo 10 by'akarere kawe — urutonde rwuzuye rw'umwimerere.
feat2_p: Ikizamini cyo kwitoza: ibibazo 33 n'igihe ntarengwa cy'iminota 60 — amategeko amwe nk'ay'ikizamini nyacyo.
feat3_p: Nyuma ya buri gisubizo ubona ako kanya niba cyari cyiza cyangwa kibi — wiga uko ugenda.
feat4_p: Uburyo bwihariye bufite gusa ibibazo wasubije nabi — uziba icyuho cyawe neza.
feat5_p: Shyira inyenyeri ku bibazo usanga bigoye maze ugaruke kuri byo igihe icyo ari cyo cyose.
feat6_p: Wige uri mu metero, mu murongo, aho ari ho hose — nta interineti na busa ikenewe.
scr_lede: Imiterere iri mu Kinyarwanda. Igishushanyo gituje, cyoroshye, nta kindi cyongerwaho.
scr1_alt: Urupapuro rw'ikibazo rufite ibisubizo byahinduwe mu Kinyarwanda
scr2_alt: Ikibazo gifite ifoto: icyumba cyuzuye cy'Inteko ya Bundestag
scr2_cap: Ibibazo bifite amashusho — nk'uko bimeze ku kizamini
scr3_alt: Ikizamini cyo kwitoza gifite igihe cy'iminota 60
how_lede: Kuva ku gushyiraho kugeza ku kwiteguza ikizamini.
step1_p: Shyiraho ku buntu, hitamo Ikinyarwanda na leta yawe.
step2_p: Soma ibibazo bifite ubusobanuro, shyira inyenyeri ku bigoye maze usubiremo amakosa yawe.
step3_p: Igerageze mu buryo bw'ikizamini — hanyuma winjire ku kizamini nyacyo wizeye.
final_lede: Ku buntu. Mu Kinyarwanda. Bikora nta interineti.
disc1_p: Uyu ni umushinga w'uburezi wigenga, atari porogaramu yemewe y'Ibiro bya Federasiyo bishinzwe Abimukira n'Impunzi (BAMF). Porogaramu ntifitanye isano n'urwego rwa leta rwose kandi ntiyerekana ikigo cyose cyemewe.
disc2_p: Ibibazo by'ikizamini bishingiye ku rutonde rw'ibibazo byemewe bya BAMF. Ibikubiyemo by'umwimerere byatangajwe mu Kidage muri ikigo cyo gukoreraho ibizamini kuri interineti cya BAMF.
disc3_p: Ubusobanuro bwakozwe na AI kugira ngo bufashe abakoresha bafite ubumenyi buke bw'Ikidage kandi bushobora kuba bufite amakosa. Niba utekereza ko ubusobanuro bugomba kunozwa, ushobora kumenyesha umuhanga utaziho uhereye muri porogaramu. Ni inyandiko y'umwimerere y'Ikidage gusa y'ibibazo ifite agaciro.
disc4_p: Ibikubiye muri iyi porogaramu bigenewe gusa kwitegura ikizamini. N'ubwo twitegura twitonze, ntidushobora kwemeza ukuri, kuzuza cyangwa kuba bigezweho kw'amakuru; ubwishingizi ubwo ari bwo bwose ku byangiritse bitaziguye cyangwa biziguye biva mu gukoresha iyi porogaramu burakuweho. Ibikoresho byemewe bya BAMF gusa ni byo bifite agaciro.
f_about: Kwitegura ikizamini cya "Leben in Deutschland" (Einbürgerungstest) mu rurimi rwawe kavukire. Porogaramu ya 85apps.
